# <velin-popover>

Source: `components/velin-popover.js`

## Accessibility
WCAG contract status: **pass** (framework target: AAA).

- **Roles:** `dialog`, `tooltip`
- **Keyboard:** Escape, Enter/Space on trigger; focus opens hover mode
- **Notes:** aria-labelledby or default aria-label; non-button triggers get role=button.

| Attribute | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| `open` | Observed — triggers `attributeChangedCallback` when changed |
## Events
_None._

- `title`

- `trigger`
